proposed_shadow_rule_candidates.observation: T06 (proof/examples request) classified as SHADOW_LOG at confidence 0.88 — below 0.85 threshold produces HUMAN_REVIEW. Rule: if broad_category=PROOF_REQUEST and confidence>=0.85, promote to shadow-eligible.
proposed_shadow_rule_candidates.label: Proof/examples request → SHADOW_LOG

proposed_shadow_rule_candidates.observation: T16 (out-of-office) returned SHADOW_LOG not BLOCKED_PERMANENT. Confirm this is correct per approved reply policy — typically OOO gets a NOOP, not a shadow draft.
proposed_shadow_rule_candidates.label: OUT_OF_OFFICE not permanently blocked — verify suppression policy

proposed_shadow_rule_candidates.observation: T17 (unlisted sender) and T18 (unlisted campaign) returned SHADOW_LOG because the shadow evaluator always uses empty allowlists. In production, these would route to BLOCKED — verify allowlist logic wire-up before Gate 2.
proposed_shadow_rule_candidates.label: Allowlist-controlled decisions need config wire-up

owner_actions: Confirm SHADOW_LOG decisions are correct for: T01-T06, T09, T16-T20
Confirm BLOCKED_PERMANENT decisions are correct for: T07-T08, T10-T15, T19
Review proposed rule candidates RC-SHADOW-001 through RC-SHADOW-003
Plan allowlist wire-up verification before Gate 2 (RC-SHADOW-003)
Continue shadow review for 14 days before Gate 2 decision
gate_2_recommendation: 14 days shadow review before any controlled pilot. Owner must approve Gate 2 explicitly. Do not change autonomous_enabled, shadow_only, or dry_run without Gate 2 sign-off.
